data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for session-to-checkout linkage.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the session-to-checkout linkage, but the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or data that confirm this linkage is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for session-to-checkout linkage, yet there is no direct evidence provided to support its validation. Therefore, the assessment is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of session-to-checkout linkage validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify session-to-checkout linkage.
